title: The Bedroom Studio
subtitle: Launching a coding channel with a $50 microphone
description: Kanha recorded his first Python and CSS tutorials while finishing his software engineering degree. The goal was simple: explain topics the way he wished they had been explained to him.

title: The 100,000 Milestone
subtitle: Building a core community of student builders
description: After graduating and working as a senior engineer at a top tech company, Kanha focused his channel on system architecture and React. The community grew rapidly as the practical, project-based content resonated.

title: Going Full-Time Creative
subtitle: Resigning from corporate tech to educate the world
description: Kanha left his software architecture position to build Tech Master full-time. He launched the MasterClass suite, which quickly grew to host over 50,000 student enrollments.

title: Global Stage Speaking Tour
subtitle: Inspiring audiences from Dubai to Silicon Valley
description: Invited as a guest keynote speaker at TEDx, Google DevFest, and international universities to talk about the future of tech education, AI developer tools, and building a developer brand.

title: 2 Million Strong & Beyond
subtitle: Scaling educational ecosystems and open-source contributions
description: Reaching over 2.5 million subscribers on YouTube, launching an interactive coding web app, and partnering with tech giants like Nvidia and GitHub to offer free educational courses to underrepresented students.
